title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers video demonstrates building AI agents using the Strands Agents SDK, showing how agents work as loops that reason, select tools, and execute them iteratively. The tutorial progresses from single-tool agents to multi-tool agents to multi-agent orchestrators, emphasizing the simplicity of the underlying pattern.
